content: Phase 1: Build core business logic POC module
Phase 1: Test POC - overlap validation, income calc, vacancy calc
Phase 1: Fix POC until all edge cases pass
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design agent
Phase 2: Backend - CRUD endpoints + calculation endpoints
Phase 2: Frontend - All pages and CRUD screens
Phase 2: All user stories covered in Development and testing
Phase 2: End to End Testing using Testing Agent
Phase 3: Merge Properties + Units pages into one combined page
Phase 3: Remove Units from sidebar navigation
